visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a stylized red background featuring blurred calligraphy. A young woman with long dark hair and a black hoodie appears, smiling broadly. She holds a small red square with the character '福' and sticks it onto a grey metal safe or locker. (2) She holds up a larger red paper with '春' and cheerful text overlays appear. The setting is an indoor office or studio with shelves and posters in the background. (3) A sequence of close-up shots follows, showing her materials: a beige beauty blender, a purple-capped ink bottle, and blank red squares. She pours ink into a small jar and dips the pointed end of the beauty blender into it. (4) Detailed shots show her using the beauty blender as a stamp or brush to write '春' and '滿' on the red paper. Her hands have manicured nails. (5) She displays the finished couplets '平安' and '福' to the camera with a joyful expression. (6) She sticks the couplets on white cabinets and the grey safe. Animated gold coin icons and 'overflowing' text stickers emerge from the safe. (7) She poses for the camera making peace signs. (8) The final segment shows a 'fail' scene where a very large, slightly messy '招財進寶' calligraphy piece on red paper is compared to a reference on a smartphone screen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 新年到! HAPPY NEW YEAR. (2) [Subtitle]: 這是我們的錢箱. (3) [Subtitle]: 今天來. [Slogan]: 用美妝蛋寫春聯. (4) [Subtitle]: 準備的材料有. [Variety]: 美妝蛋. [Variety]: 墨水. [Variety]: 空白春聯. (5) [Subtitle]: 尖頭位置沾墨水. (6) [Variety]: 平安. [Variety]: 福. (7) [Subtitle]: 滿出來. [Variety]: $$$. (8) [Variety]: 翻車現場. [Subtitle]: (不是字歪, 是紙太大型).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male colleague briefly visible in the background background during setup.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, dark hair wearing a casual oversized black zip-up hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor office or craft studio containing white cabinets, a grey metal safe, various toy figures on shelves, and a wooden table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy synthesized electronic BGM starts immediately with a strong 4/4 beat. A bright, high-pitched female voice speaks with high arousal and fast delivery. (2) A clear liquid pouring sound (glug-glug) occurs as the narrator mentions materials, overlapping with a popping sound effect for text entry. (3) A soft percussive thud or squish sound accompanies the beauty blender hitting the paper, synced with the rhythmic BGM. (4) Frequent 'whoosh' and 'ding' sound effects mark fast visual transitions. (5) In the final phase, the main BGM cuts to a humorous, quirky accordion-like jingle to emphasize the 'blooper' or 'fail' context, accompanied by a slide-whistle SFX.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction of Materials -> Process Demonstration -> Result Showcase -> Humorous Blooper.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain and inform viewers about a creative, non-traditional 'hack' for writing Lunar New Year couplets using a makeup sponge (beauty blender) instead of a traditional brush.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-density social media editing styles with rapid cuts and playful SFX to maintain high engagement.
